# Fetched Sources

The CMake skeleton fetches these repositories with `FetchContent` at configure
time. Commits were resolved from GitHub default branches on 2026-06-27.

| Project | URL | Commit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| tree-sitter | https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter | cbee4672665173d1702d836353ef7648dc2b2fac |
| tree-sitter-c | https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c | b780e47fc780ddc8da13afa35a3f4ed5c157823d |

| tree-sitter-bash | https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-bash | a06c2e4415e9bc0346c6b86d401879ffb44058f7 |
| tree-sitter-python | https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-python | 26855eabccb19c6abf499fbc5b8dc7cc9ab8bc64 |

## Language Pack

`tree-sitter-language-pack-languages.txt` was extracted from the PyPI source
distribution for `tree-sitter-language-pack` 1.10.9, uploaded 2026-06-24.
The package metadata describes this release as containing 306 programming
languages, matching the 306 language identifiers in the extracted list.

Source distribution:
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/4b/e7/0d10f0b9ca5119ed57ad1295d0303fd5cfdbf5e6cf04ba6137737166517b/tree_sitter_language_pack-1.10.9.tar.gz
